name: Knowledge Web page renders its concept explorer for a logged-in user
description: A logged-in user opens /app/knowledge-web and sees the real Knowledge Web feature -- the 'Knowledge Web' heading and the guidance about seeing how concepts connect across subjects -- with the interactive concept area rendered below (either a graph/node canvas or a clear empty state prompting the user to add concepts). This is a new account, so a populated graph is NOT required.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Verify the page renders the 'Knowledge Web' heading (not a 404 or blank screen) with the descriptive guidance about how concepts connect across subjects

Verify the concept explorer area below the header renders real content -- either an interactive node/graph canvas OR a clear empty-state message inviting the user to add concepts -- rather than an empty or broken container
